Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We have a fairly detailed description The user has a process description normative constraints strict sequence and desiderata recommended but not strict There is an event log with three cases

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The task Identify which cases are violating the normative rules and explain the reasons Identify which cases fail to meet the desiderata conditions Clarify that while these deviations are not severe they represent suboptimal behavior When possible suggest interpretations or justifications for the observed behaviors in line with the given constraints and recommendations

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to produce an answer that addresses these tasks The answer must be structured possibly bullet points per case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We will do normative violation identification case 2 has normative violations missing credit check before risk assessment performing finalization after rejection Possibly case 2 also violates ordering credit check after risk assessment also performing finalization after rejection which is not allowed No other normative violations

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Desiderata violation case 3 fails timing recommendations credit check greater than 24 hours after application inform applicant greater than 48 hours after loan decision missing follow up call

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Also possibly case 1 and case 2 might also have timing issues Lets check case 1 timeline 0900 receive 0930 credit check within 24 hours risk assessment at 1000 loan decision at 1100 inform at 1300 2 hours after loan decision finalize at 1330 close at 1400 All within recommended time frames plus follow up call not present

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: No follow up call maybe a desideratum violation if they did not do it But the description says encouraged but not strictly required to perform a follow up call before closing case So the absence is not a serious violation it is just a desideratum violation if they should have done but did not So we could note that case 1 also fails to have a follow up call but it is optional

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 After credit check performed after risk assessment normative violation Also finalization after rejection Timing credit check still within 24 hours Inform applicant after loan decision not present That is also a normative violation Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision So they did not inform at all

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 has multiple normative violations

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Sequence must be Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 correct order includes finalization and close So no normative violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 Sequence broken Risk Assessment before Credit Check missing Inform Applicant finalization after rejection So normative violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Sequence correct Application Received Credit Check delayed Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant delayed Finalize Documentation Close Case All ordering correct finalization after approval So normative constraints satisfied However timeline violates desiderata credit check greater than 24 hours after application inform greater than 48 hours after decision no follow up call

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus normative violations only for case 2 But also case 2 missing Inform Applicant that is normative violation

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We could propose possible explanations maybe case 2 credit check performed after risk assessment because they had incomplete data and needed to start risk assessment quickly or maybe system error finalization after rejection may be a system bug or manual oversight missing inform applicant could be oversight

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Case 3 timing delays could be due to external factors backlog holidays applicant unavailability follow up call not performed perhaps due to resource constraints

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: We also could comment on follow up call for case 1 and 3 optional

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We also need to clearly differentiate normative violations versus desiderata violations

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Provide table summarizing

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: We could propose recommended actions for case 2 re sequence steps ensure credit check before risk assessment add missing inform applicant step do not finalize documentation after rejection for case 3 try to meet timing guidelines schedule credit check sooner inform applicant within 48 hours add follow up call

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 no normative violation Desiderata missing follow up call optional Credit check done within 30 minutes less than 24 hours inform within 2 hours less than 48 hours

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 normative okay but desiderata violations credit check greater than 24 hours after application inform greater than 48 hours after loan decision missing follow up call
